message:
feat: add DetailedStatus introspection for rich /status panel

Add Session.DetailedStatus() that aggregates tools (categorized by
source), MCP servers, skills, plugins, hooks, subagents, and plugin
agents into a single struct. Add MCPManager.Servers() and
HookRunner.Summary() accessor methods. Store loaded plugins on
Session for status reporting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
